---
title: "The contemporary aspect of the crime of enforced disappearances"
author: "Christodoulou, C., Kovras, N., Ioannidis, I., and Djouvas, C."
date: 2025-01-01
description: "15th Annual Conference of the European Political Science Association (EPSA 2025), Madrid"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
